basic_details.job_title: ICMR NIRDH Project Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR National Institute for Research in Digital Health
basic_details.post_name: Project Technical Assistant-II, Project Technical Assistant-I
basic_details.short_information: ICMR National Institute for Research in Digital Health (ICMR NIRDH) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 7 Project Technical Assistant-II, Project Technical Assistant-I Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the ICMR NIRDH office with original documents and self-attested copies.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max 30 years for PTS-II, Max 28 years for PTS-I
age_limit.details: Project Technical Assistant-II: Maximum age limit is 30 years. Project Technical Assistant-I: Maximum age limit is 28 years.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th pass, 12th pass with Diploma in Medical Lab Tech/PMW/Radiology or equivalent with experience
qualification.details: Project Technical Assistant-II: 12th pass in science subjects, Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technician, Diploma in PMW, Diploma in Radiology/Radiography or related subject, One year DMLT course + one year required experience in a recognized organisation, One year field/laboratory experience or animal house keeping in Govt. Recognized organisation, Graduation degree (treated as 3-years' experience). Project Technical Assistant-I: 10th pass, MLT / DMLT / ITI or equivalent diploma, Two years experience in relevant subject/Field.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 20,000/- + HRA Per Month, Rs. 18,000/- + HRA Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICMR NIRDH recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ICMR NIRDH recruitment is scheduled for 12th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they are present on this date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for Project Technical Assistant-II?
faq.answer: For Project Technical Assistant-II, candidates need to have passed 12th in science subjects and possess a Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technician, PMW, Radiology/Radiography, or equivalent. A Graduation degree is considered equivalent to 3 years of experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for Project Technical Assistant-I?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Technical Assistant-I position is 28 years. There might be age relaxations for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for Project Technical Assistant-II?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Technical Assistant-II post will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000/- plus HRA per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for Project Technical Assistant-I?
faq.answer: There are 3 vacancies available for the Project Technical Assistant-I position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these temporary positions at ICMR NIRDH will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to perform well in the interview to be considered.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies of certificates, mark sheets, ID proof, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Project Technical Assistant-II and Project Technical Assistant-I are on a temporary basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the ICMR NIRDH office in New Delhi, with the pincode 110029.
